processedAthletes.notes: Exact full-name match and affiliation context support the HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu CLPL row as confirmed at audit-log level. This run does not rewrite data/database.json because the minified database file should not be edited without a schema-preserving script pass.

confirmedHistories.identityCheck: Exact Japanese full-name match in HPA official result PDF; Numata roster lot name is 山下 幹太. Affiliation Far East Strength is consistent with the earlier Lot 81-85 batch extraction.

reconciliationResult.interpretation: PR #149 remains useful as a no-mutation audit, but its Lot 85 note should not be read as disproving PR #91. The HPA official Spring Ebetsu row for 山下 幹太 is confirmed at research-batch level and should be the source of truth for a future schema-safe database promotion.
reconciliationResult.safeNextStep: Promote this confirmed Lot 85 CLPL row to data/database.json only with a script that preserves the minified JSON schema and source-link conventions. Keep the ★ record-marker as a cautious note until the exact HPA record category is separately verified.
